events.name: New York Knicks at Atlanta Hawks

headlines.description: — Atlanta's Dyson Daniels and New York's Mitchell Robinson were ejected from Game 6 of the Hawks-Knicks playoff series Thursday night after a fight that prompted offsetting technical fouls, part of a game in which New York would go on to win by 51...
headlines.shortLinkText: Daniels, Robinson ejected after fight, part of one-sided series-clinching win for Knicks over Hawks
